\caption{Survey of VRDU models grouped by architecture category. \textbf{Mod.}: input modality (T\,=\,text, V\,=\,visual, L\,=\,layout). \textbf{OCR}: whether the model requires OCR pre-processing (\textsuperscript{*}\,=\,optional or partial OCR). \textbf{RAG Strat.}: retrieval strategy (Dense, Sparse, Joint\,=\,both). \textbf{Prompt Strat.}: prompting strategy (CoT\,=\,Chain of Thought; ReAct\,=\,Reason\,+\,Act). \textbf{Agentic}: agentic workflow type (Open\,=\,open-ended tool use; Fixed\,=\,fixed pipeline). `--' indicates not reported.}
\label{tab:model_survey_arch}
\end{table}
